title: Bingo Enhanced
description: A mod pack to enhance Bingo gameplay
body:
# Bingo Enhanced This mod pack improves the game in a number of ways to make it more enjoyable. To achieve this, this modpack contains - Various shaders (BSL, Kappa, more to come) - Optimisation mods like Sodium, Lithium, etc. - Visual enhancements (Wavey capes) - QoL mods (Numeral Ping or Ok Zoomer)
- 3D Skin Layers
- AppleSkin
- Camera Utils
- Full Brightness Toggle
- ImmediatelyFast
- Iris Shaders
- Lithium
- Mod Menu
- Numeral Ping
- Ok Zoomer
- Scoreboard Overhaul
- Simple Voice Chat
- Sodium
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Wavey Capes
- Yet Another Bingo
Mods
Shaders - BSL Shaders
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
- Complementary Shaders - Unbound
- MakeUP - Ultra Fast
- Rethinking Voxels
- Solas Shader
## Server Setup If you need help setting up or optimising your server for bingo, fennifith (The Bingo Mod Developer) has a [great wiki on how to do](https://horrific.dev/bingo/server-setup/) this. ## Compatibility The modpack will only update to the latest version of Minecraft. Older versions will not be updated.
